blockers: Leaf worker launches via functions.task returned synchronously and did not provide a background agent id; launch_started events were recorded with agent-id="unknown".

high_risk_items: bin/stampede.sh default MODEL is claude-haiku-4.5 while SKILL.md states default model claude-sonnet-4.5; cheap-model usage is likely if users follow different docs.
Commander/child banned-model enforcement is mostly instructional; no clear mechanical pre-flight block for commander -> child task launches.
tests/depth-guard-lint.sh does not assert banned-model strings; it can pass even if banned-model guardrails are removed from commander docs.
notes: Metaswarm launcher path does reject banned models supplied to --model/--models (bin/stampede.sh:516-530). The larger remaining risk is child launches from commanders omitting/violating model overrides.

key_source_refs: tests/depth-guard-lint.sh:35-53 (required commander phrases excludes banned list)
